title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three years in the Twinkle Series with
Mejiro Bright have come to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that doesn't mean there are no more races to
run. As they continue, the biggest rival to emerge
is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surprisingly, neither Mejiro McQueen nor Silence
Suzuka, but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thanks for such a fun race, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Spe. The two of us took first and second place once again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I must admit, I never thought I'd see you making
so many appearances in long-distance races,
though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week—even among the latest generation
of Umamusume, the speed of her last-stretch
dash is outstanding.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I did think she'd be concentrating her efforts on
medium-distance races, though...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, a-actually, I've got a confession to make,
Bright...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I really look up to you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I respect you! I mean, you're the "Bright" light of
the Mejiro family! You really wowed me when we
were running together.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
No matter how long the race is, you always go all
out on the final stretch, and you're carrying the
mantle of such an amazing line of racers.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I don't know much about stayers, but...
long-distance races sure are fun!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I want to be just like you, Bright, and run with all
I've got even in the longer races!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Thank you ever so much, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Special Week comes to spend most of her
time—both on and off the racetrack—following
after Mejiro Bright.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And Mejiro Bright herself seems more than happy
to have Special Week around...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Shall we take a break and have a little snack,
Spe?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I've brought a lovely batch of sweet scones with
me, and some nice chamomile tea to pair them
with.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Yes, please! Mejiro sweets are always so
yummy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, it must be nice being able to eat them every
day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, you're quite welcome to come and spend
the night anytime you wish.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I am?! Really?! Well in that case, I'm free—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Spe? Why are you... talking with Bright?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Hi, Suzuka! Bright's been teaching me all
kinds of stuff!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: She's so kind. I've learned a bunch! You really have the best friends, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, Bright... I'm not sure how to say this but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hmm?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I just... I'm not going to lose.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hmm?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm just not...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few sparks of intensity crackle for a brief
moment, but they're both too aloof to notice
them before...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey there, Bright. Meow, meow. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Meow, meow to you, too, Sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Seiun Sky. She's one of Special Week's
peers and a tactical front runner.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Bright, that last race was really something,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
No matter what, you always find a way to close
the gap. I feel like I really have to keep an eye on
you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you sure did whoop me in the end
anyway, though. Heh. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, I think I was just ever so sliiightly lucky there.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
There you go again, being aaall humble... And
that speed burst of yours isn't even your only
charm.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Your hair's so soft and poofy too. Napping next
to you... It's pretty heavenly.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's why I feel like dropping by to say hi like
this when I've got a little spare time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why, thank you, Sky. I never thought I'd form this
many connections with people outside of the
Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Let's stay good friends from here on out as well.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, sure. I'd like that a lot.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Looking forward to seeing what you can do, too,
Trainer! Bright's practically our idol, after all!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
If it's not too much trouble, we wouldn't mind you
giving us a few pointers too, you know. Meow,
meow. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even outside the Mejiro family, more and more
people are being captivated by Mejiro Bright's
congenial personality.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's also accumulating more and more
long-distance rivals. Through Bright, the Mejiro
approach is sure to continue influencing the world
of Umamusume.
